---
title: "糖不卷"
image: https://hdata.obs.cn-east-3.myhuaweicloud.com/blog/profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: fab fa-weibo
      text: 微博
      href: https://m.weibo.cn/profile/1651226607
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:hfutqiufei@163.com
    - icon: origin:知
      text: 知乎
      href: https://www.zhihu.com/people/cionysus
    # - icon: github
    #   text: Github
    #   href: https://github.com/qiufei
    # - icon: fab fa-weixin
    #   text: 微信
    #   href: weixin:cionysus
email-obfuscation: javascript
---

我是邱飞，这是我的个人网站，用于分享一些数据分析文章和生活感悟。
